ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SHIRLEY THREETS' CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. ALL FUNDS BEING HELD BY THE LEVYING OFFICER ARE TO BE RETURNED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. THE COURT WILL PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: ROSE MILLER, CSR# 5041.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lisa Espada of Law Office of Lisa J. Espada telephone number 415-504-6195 for Defendant Lisa Threets.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Defendant Shirley Threets' Claim of Exemption is granted. All funds being held by the Levying Officer are to be returned to the Judgment Debtor. The Court will prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR# 5041. (302/HK)
